<?php namespace Aws\MarketplaceCommerceAnalytics; use Aws\AwsClient; /** * This client is used to interact with the **AWS Marketplace Commerce Analytics** service. * * @method \Aws\Result generateDataSet(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise generateDataSetAsync(array $args = []) * @method \Aws\Result startSupportDataExport(array $args = []) * @method \GuzzleHttp\Promise\Promise startSupportDataExportAsync(array $args = []) */ class MarketplaceCommerceAnalyticsClient extends AwsClient {}
